fluxOfficials.text: The Dubai partials market opened well bid, with Totsa bidding at $127.50 and not an offer in sight. Meanwhile, by 8:00 GMT Oman had $46 bid/offer spread and Murban was around $106.20. Most oil installations are out of commission and even Mina Al Fahal temporarily suspended loadings.
fluxOfficials.note: Today's Dubai Assessment NOT yet posted by FluxOfficials as of report generation time (08:36 UTC)

finalsOnClose.note: ME Sour Crude Finals on Close not yet published as of report generation time

marketContext: Iran attacked Oman oil tanks (reported 11 Mar)
Mina Al Fahal temporarily suspended loadings
Most oil installations out of commission
Shell declared force majeure on LNG deliveries to Asia
